title: malva italica var. angustisecta
intro: Malva italica var. angustisecta, also known as the Italian mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in mucilages, which have been shown to provide relief from digestive issues and soothe irritated skin. Herbal preparations of Malva italica var. angustisecta can be made into teas, infusions, or syrups to harness its health benefits, making it a valuable remedy in traditional herbal medicine.
